zh.Bromfield, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾布洛姆費爾德
zh.Poynton with Worth, Cheshire, England: 英國爾波易頓 煙雨 沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward de Warenne於大約1315年出生在英國史洛普爾布洛姆費爾德時，他的父親John de Warrene30歲，母親Lady Maud de Nerford31歲。他於大約1341年與Cicely de Eton在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1349年10月20日之前在英國爾波易頓。

zh-hans.Bromfield, Shropshire, England: 英国史洛普爾布洛姆費爾德
zh-hans.Poynton with Worth, Cheshire, England: 英国爾波易頓 煙雨 沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward de Warenne于大约1315年出生在英国史洛普爾布洛姆費爾德时，他的父亲John de Warrene30岁，母亲Lady Maud de Nerford31岁。他于大约1341年与Cicely de Eton在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1349年10月20日之前在英国爾波易頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward de Warenne was born about 1315, in Bromfield, Shropshire, England, his father, John de Warrene, was 30 and his mother, Lady Maud de Nerford, was 31. He married Cicely de Eton about 1341, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died before 20 October 1349, in Poynton, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward de Warenne est né environ 1315, à Bromfield, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Warrene, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Maud de Nerford, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Cicely d’Eton environ 1341, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé avant 20 octobre 1349, à Poynton, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward de Warenne um 1315 in Bromfield, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Warrene 30 und seine Mutter Lady Maud de Nerford 31. Er hat um 1341 in England Cicely de Eton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb vor 20. Oktober 1349 in Poynton, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward de Warenne è nato il circa 1315 nel Bromfield, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, John de Warrene, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Maud de Nerford, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Cicely de Eton circa 1341, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì prima del 20 ottobre 1349, nel Poynton, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Warenneが約1315年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブロムフィールドで生まれた時，父John de Warreneは30歳，母Lady Maud de Nerfordは31歳であった。約1341年にイギリスでCicely de Etonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1349年10月20日以前にイギリスチェシュアイアポイントンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Warenne(이)가 대략 1315년 영국 슈럽실르 브롬필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Warrene(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Maud de Nerford(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1341년 영국에서 Cicely de Eton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1349년 10월 20일 이전 영국 체실르 포이턴에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1315–before 20 October 1349: ойролцоогоор 1315 он–1349 оны Аравдугаар сарын 20–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward de Warenne nasceu aproximadamente 1315, em Bromfield, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Warrene, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Maud de Nerford, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Cicely de Eton aproximadamente 1341, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 20 de outubro de 1349, em Poynton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward de Warenne родился около 1315 г. в местности бромфиелд, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Warrene было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Maud de Nerford, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Cicely de Eton около 1341 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер перед 20 октябрь 1349 г. в местности поинтон, чешир, Англия.

sm.about 1315–before 20 October 1349: e tusa o le 1315–a'e le'I oo le 20 Oketopa 1349

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward de Warenne nació aproximadamente 1315, en Bromfield, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Warrene, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Maud de Nerford, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Cicely de Eton aproximadamente 1341, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió antes de 20 de octubre de 1349, en Poynton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
